title: result + measurement records
description: Record a validated experiment outcome, or a schema-light measurement. Only validity='valid' results may back a supported claim or update best_result_ref.

provenance_route.description: How this result's provenance is established. 'executed' = a reconstructable local run (provenance must carry command, code_revision-or-worktree, a metric source, run_status; a failed run needs failure_mode). 'imported'/'trusted' = a non-execution route (provenance must carry a 'source' or 'note' citing origin). 'waived' = provenance intentionally deferred (provenance.waiver_reason required). Validator-gated: `result validate` computes provenance_ok from this; the author cannot self-certify.

provenance.description: Run-manifest fields where applicable: command, config_ref/config_hash, seed, dataset, split, eval_protocol, metric_source, code_revision, worktree, env, log_ref, output_artifacts, run_status, failure_mode, metric_notes; or source/note (imported/trusted); or waiver_reason (waived).

is_primary.description: the single BO objective per result (invariant single_primary_measurement)
